generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are quietly shifting defense spending to domestic priorities? While they cut back, we're left holding the bag. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation—it's about ensuring our security when others won't step up. Let's invest in our own capabilities so we're never caught off guard again. #NationalSecurityFirst
